nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report correctly identifies the idle instance and surfaces the pipeline warning, but technical explanations are generic boilerplate lacking resource-specific metrics (CPU %, instance type, stop duration), the rationale doesn't address alternatives, and the pipeline risk is named but not concretely described or actioned.
